bird.name: Seychelles swiftlet
bird.summary: The Seychelles swiftlet (Aerodramus elaphrus) is a small bird of the swift family. It is found only in the Seychelles Islands in the Indian…

relations.subject: Seychelles swiftlet
relations.evidence: The species is classified as Vulnerable by the IUCN due to its small population (2,500 to 3,000 birds) and limited number of breeding sites
relations.object_summary: 种群规模过小导致遗传多样性下降和脆弱性上升。

relations.subject: Seychelles swiftlet
relations.evidence: Threats include disturbance, use of insecticides and predation by introduced barn owls and cats
relations.object_summary: 旅游、施工和高频活动影响繁殖或觅食。
